suite.name: Cart Checkout Scenario

kw.name: A Logged-In User Session Is Started With Empty Cart
I Am Authenticated To The API
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=shopdemo, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '54'} body=b'{"email": "yorgo@hotmail.com", "password": "Test123!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: The Response Status Is
kw.doc: Asserts the HTTP response status code equals expected_code.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=shopdemo_auth, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiZW1haWwiOiJ5b3Jnb0Bob3RtYWlsLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzA4NTY1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNjkwNDUxfQ.5LZ-k5QeXziyGz0SI0E33-KTPvXXfZnIoDL9hSsIZYU'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: I Clear My Cart Via API
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/cart path_url=/cart headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwiZW1haWwiOiJ5b3Jnb0Bob3RtYWlsLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzA4NTY1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzczNjkwNDUxfQ.5LZ-k5QeXziyGz0SI0E33-KTPvXXfZnIoDL9hSsIZYU'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/cart status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': 'http://localhost:5173', 'Vary': 'Origin', 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials': 'true', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '2', 'ETag': 'W/"2-l9Fw4VUO7kr8CvBlt4zaMCqXZ0w"', 'Date': 'Mon, 09 Mar 2026 19:47:31 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Removes all items from the current user's cart via the API. Requires an authenticated session (shopdemo_auth) to already exist.

kw.name: A Logged-In User Session Is Started
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "args": ["--use-mock-keychain", "--disable-features=AutofillAssistant,PasswordManagerOnboardingPromo", "--disable-save-password-bubble"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/yorgo.aoun/Desktop/Robot-mcp/reports/browser/traces/temp/bd61811a-b409-4e76-ac6e-afc3fd57ddb4"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive load in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: I Am On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="login-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'yorgo@hotmail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Test123!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="navbar-user"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Opens the browser, navigates to login, and authenticates as a valid user.
Logs in via browser and clears the cart via API so tests start from a known state.

test.name: Step 1 - A Product Can Be Added To The Cart

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Given I Am On The Product Catalog
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="product-card"] >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: When I Add The First Product To My Cart
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="add-to-cart-button"] >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then The Cart Badge Should Show "1"
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="cart-badge"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: The Number Is Equal To
kw.doc: Asserts ``actual == expected`` as integers.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Adding a product from the catalog should increment the cart badge to 1.

test.name: Step 2 - The Cart Reflects The Added Item

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Given I Navigate To My Cart
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="cart-item"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Then My Cart Should Have Items
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: The Count Is Greater Than
kw.doc: Asserts a count is strictly greater than threshold.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Navigating to the cart should show the item added in Step 1.

test.name: Step 3 - Checkout Completes The Purchase

kw.name: Capture Step Start
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Embeds a screenshot in the report before each step begins.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="checkout-button"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then The Purchase Was Successful
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="order-success"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: The Order ID Should Be Displayed
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="order-id"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: The Text Is Not Empty
kw.doc: Asserts a string contains at least one non-whitespace character.
Verifies the order success banner and order ID are shown.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: Clicking Checkout from the cart should place the order and show a confirmation.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc:
Scenario: Cart and Checkout Flow
Steps run in order — state accumulates across test cases intentionally. Suite Setup clears the cart and logs in so the scenario always starts from an empty cart. Suite Teardown closes the browser. The cart is empty because Step 3 places an order (clearing it).
